rules.description: Medication must be taken by 10:00 AM every day.
Hands must be washed with soap and water after every toilet visit.
Hands must be washed with soap and water after every cooking activity.
The toilet must be used at least once during the day (between 07:00 and 22:00).
The stove or oven must not be left on unattended. If the resident leaves the kitchen, the stove should be off within 10 minutes.
The fridge door should not remain open for more than 10 minutes.
The water heater should not remain on for more than 2 hours without any shower activity detected.
No exits from the home should occur between 23:00 and 05:00. Any night-time door opening is a potential safety concern.
If no movement is detected for more than 3 consecutive hours during daytime (09:00–21:00), a welfare check should be triggered.
